items.example: In my opinion, working from home is more productive.
I'd rather work outside than sit in an office all day.

items.phrase: It's not my cup of tea
items.translation: Это не моё / не по мне
items.example: Working in retail is not my cup of tea.

items.translation: Насколько я считаю / что касается меня
items.example: As far as I'm concerned, flexible hours are the best.
To be honest, I don't enjoy working at weekends.
I prefer working outdoors to sitting at a desk.
The best thing about my job is the flexible hours.
